dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires price to move above the central pivot (pivot indicator). Exit condition is author-silent, so implemented a reversal condition: close below pivot. The reference to 'previous day's closing level' is inherent in the pivot calculation which uses prev_close in standard pivot formulas.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires price to move above the central pivot (pivot indicator). Exit condition is author-silent, so implemented a reversal condition: close below pivot. The reference to 'previous day's closing level' is inherent in the pivot calculation which uses prev_close in standard pivot formulas.

source_rule_text: Any move above the pivot signifies bullishness and presents a trading opportunity.
